purpose: Small connector-friendly evidence file for ChatGPT. The daily workflow now regenerates this file from market_report.json/action_board inputs to avoid large JSON connector empty-content issues.

reasons: initial snapshot created by ChatGPT from latest commit diff
github_data_quality.usage_rule: Use High/Medium as evidence; Medium-Low only as auxiliary evidence; Low/Unusable cannot justify trades by itself. This initial file should be replaced by the next workflow-generated snapshot.

market_report_status.strategy_version: Eason Master US Market Monitor Cloud Sync v4.5.2 tiered-cache-coverage-gaps

connector_issue_fixed_by.problem: GitHub connector fetch_file returned empty content for large docs/market_report.json even though the report exists and commits update it.
connector_issue_fixed_by.fix: scripts/build_action_board_v3.py now writes docs/chatgpt_snapshot.json and docs/chatgpt_snapshot.txt as compact read targets.

required_live_checks_before_order: IBKR bid/ask/last or two public quote sources
current price vs tested signal area
real account cash, position size, QQQ+SMH+MSFT concentration, semiconductor exposure, MSFT exposure
exact limit price, invalidation level, and cancel condition
